title: Mission Report Ep. 03 | Antigravity Updates
summary: Google Antigravity is an agentic development platform that evolves the IDE into an agent-first era. It enables developers to manage agents across workspaces with a familiar AI IDE experience, with agents operating across the editor, terminal, and browser to autonomously plan and execute complex end-to-end tasks in software development.
